name: Button
description: Button component with multiple variants and styles

description: Link component with text content and configurable states

props.title: New window

name: Tag
description: Tag component for categorization elements with various styles

props.description: Optional URL to convert to a link.

props.title: New window
props.description: Whether to open in a new window (only if URL is provided).

name: Chip
description: Interactive chip component for filters, tags and input elements

name: Image
description: Basic image component

name: Accordion
description: Collapsible accordion component with expandable panels

props.name: panels
props.title: Panels
props.description: Accordion panels. Each panel is an object with title (string), content (string), and expanded (boolean).

props.name: expand_all
props.title: Expand all
props.description: Whether to expand all panels by default.

props.name: with_background
props.title: With background
props.description: Whether to display with a background.

name: Breadcrumb
description: Navigation component displaying hierarchical path links

props.name: links
props.title: Links
props.description: Breadcrumb links. Each item is an object with text (string) and url (string).

props.name: active_is_link
props.title: Active is link
props.description: Whether to show the active element as a link.
